recommendations.title: The African Queen
recommendations.overview: At the start of the First World War, in the middle of Africa’s nowhere, a gin soaked riverboat captain is persuaded by a strong-willed missionary to go down river and face-off a German warship.

recommendations.title: Beat the Devil
recommendations.overview: A group of con artists stake their claim on a bogus uranium mine.

recommendations.title: The Maltese Falcon
recommendations.overview: A private detective takes on a case that involves him with three eccentric criminals, a beautiful liar, and their quest for a priceless statuette.

recommendations.title: Wise Blood
recommendations.overview: A Southerner--young, poor, ambitious but uneducated--determines to become something in the world. He decides that the best way to do that is to become a preacher and start up his own church.

recommendations.title: Reflections in a Golden Eye
recommendations.overview: Bizarre tale of sex, betrayal, and perversion at a military post.

recommendations.title: Moulin Rouge
recommendations.overview: In 1890 Paris, Moulin Rouge is a nightclub where crippled artist Toulouse-Lautrec feels like he fits in. In the following years, he meets two women who provide an opportunity for him to find true love.

recommendations.title: Heaven Knows, Mr. Allison
recommendations.overview: A Roman Catholic nun and a hard-bitten US Marine are stranded together on a Japanese-occupied island in the South Pacific during World War II. Under constant threat of discovery by a ruthless enemy, they hide in a cave and forage for food together. T

recommendations.title: The Dead
recommendations.overview: After a convivial holiday dinner party, things begin to unravel when a husband and wife address some prickly issues concerning their marriage.

recommendations.title: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
recommendations.overview: Two jobless Americans convince a prospector to travel to the mountains of Mexico with them in search of gold. But the hostile wilderness, local bandits, and greed all get in the way of their journey.

recommendations.title: The Asphalt Jungle
recommendations.overview: Recently paroled from prison, legendary burglar "Doc" Riedenschneider, with funding from Alonzo Emmerich, a crooked lawyer, gathers a small group of veteran criminals together in the Midwest for a big jewel heist.
